subcodes.first_line: This is a Book traced by the Pen of Command, the All-Wise. Without doubt it hath been sent down from the presence of the Mighty, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب رقم من قلم امر حکیم لا ریب انه نزل من لدن عزیز علیم و قدر منه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
